    MOD = 1_000_000_007
    inv2 = 500_000_004

    y_counts = Hash.new(Int64)
    points.each do |point|

        y_counts[y] += 1

    sum_sq = 0

        c = (term * inv2) % MOD
        sum_c = (sum_c + c) % MOD
        sum_sq = (sum_sq + (c * c) % MOD) % MOD
    end

    temp = (sum_c * sum_c - sum_sq) % MOD
    if temp < 0
        temp += MOD
    end
    result = (temp * inv2) % MOD
    result
end

def solve(points : Array(Array(Int64))) : Int64
    MOD = 1_000_000_007
    inv2 = 500_000_004
    y_map = Hash(Int64, Int64).new

    end
    sum_c = 0

        end

        c = (term * inv2) % MOD
        sum_c = (sum_c + c) % MOD
        sum_sq = (sum_sq + (c * c) % MOD) % MOD
    end
    temp = (sum_c * sum_c - sum_sq) % MOD
    if temp < 0
        temp += MOD
    end
    result = (temp * inv2) % MOD
    return result
end
